name: unicode_a7dc_literal_now_claimed
description: String-literal "ƛ" (U+019B) matched by folding input Ƛ (U+A7DC → U+019B). Emits the canonical literal value ƛ. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
